is_statement: Structured cloud migration program with assessment framework, modular CMF methodology (Assess-Mobilize-Modernize), 6R migration strategies, database migration services, and sprint-based implementation.
does_statement: Migrates legacy on-premises infrastructure including SAP IS-U to sovereign cloud within 6 months, eliminating unplanned downtime during transition through parallel-run validation.
means_statement: Reduces IT operations cost by 35% while meeting KRITIS compliance deadlines, freeing capital for grid digitalization investments.

evidence.statement: E.ON migrated 2,500 SAP workloads to T-Systems sovereign cloud in 2024
